title: UFO whistleblower insists Roswell is '100% real' and recovery 'wasn't human'
description: UFO whistleblower Eric Davis claims the 1947 Roswell crash was "100% real," insisting a "not human" craft was recovered and the proof is hidden in secret files

title: Donald Trump UFO bombshell speech 'ready to go' as insider says 'it's urgent'
description: Fresh claims suggest President Donald Trump may be preparing a bombshell speech revealing decades of alleged UFO evidence, with an advisor claiming world leaders have given approval for the announcement

title: Detailed Account Of An Alien Craft Crashing In Mexaco
description: In mid August, 1945, before the term “flying saucer” was coined, Remigio Baca, age 7, and Jose Padilla, 9, were first on the scene of the crash of a strange object on the Padilla Ranch west of San Antonio, a tiny village on the Rio [...]

title: History of extraterrestrial ‘sightings’ in alien-themed town by Area 51 – road trippers passing through can ‘spot’ a UFO
description: WHAT was originally a small town developed by a farmer in the 1970s is now a destination spot for alien enthusiasts where travel experts claim "THE TRUTH IS OUT HERE." title: Alleged UFO sighted in Portugal
description: An alleged unidentified flying object (UFO) was sighted on 10 March in Portugal.
